stories.title: President Trump and Iranian officials have conflicting stories about ongoing talks
stories.description: President Trump is ordering the U.S. military to hold off on striking Iranian power plants, citing "productive" talks with Iran, but Iranian officials deny there's any dialogue with the U.S.

stories.title: Trump delays strikes on Iran's power plants for 5 days. And, ICE deploys to airports
stories.description: Trump says he will deploy ICE agents to U.S. airports to help address delays. And, the president said he would delay strikes on Iranian power plants for five days.

stories.title: Trump says the U.S. is in talks with Iran to end the war, which Iran denies
stories.description: Trump said the U.S. will postpone any strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure for five days, even as Israel continued hitting Tehran and Iran warned it could retaliate across the Gulf.

stories.title: Ukrainians are growing more pessimistic about the prospects for peace, survey says
stories.description: As the Iran war delays peace talks for Ukraine -- and global supplies of air defense missiles -- there are signs that fewer Ukrainians are willing to endure Russia's war for as long as necessary.

stories.title: Israel's war strategy involves high-level assassinations. But will it win the war?
stories.description: The war between the US, Israel and Iran is intensifying. NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Yossi Melman, who reports on Israeli intelligence, about the state of the conflict as it enters its fourth week.

stories.title: The effects of the Iran war on environmental and human health, according to an expert
stories.description: As the war in Iran enters its fourth week, the costs are adding up. NPR's Ayesha Rascoe talks to Doug Weir, with the Conflict and War Observatory, about impacts to human health and the environment.

stories.title: Trump threatens Iran's power plants as war enters fourth week with no end in sight
stories.description: We have the latest on the U-S and Israeli war on Iran, where in the past 48 hours, Israel has struck one of Iran's nuclear facilities and Iran has responded with strikes in Israel.

stories.title: A pharmacist and a homesick lifestyle blogger: The 'alarming' civilian cost of war in Iran
stories.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

stories.title: US' and Iran's options for ending war narrow the longer it goes on
stories.description: Iran shows no sign of climbdown, while air power alone cannot achieve the US' main goal.

stories.title: Israel to expand ground and air attacks against Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.

stories.title: Iranian missiles injure 180 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
stories.description: Israel is investigating how ballistic missiles got through the country's sophisticated air defences.

stories.title: Trump at a crossroads as US weighs tough options in Iran
stories.description: Statements from President Trump that the war is almost over are not matching up with the reality on the ground.

stories.title: Why there's no sign of the conflict in the Middle East 'winding down'
stories.description: Iran's foreign minister said that it doesn't appear that the US is prepared to halt its aggression after President Trump said the US was considering "winding down" its war.

stories.title: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as energy prices soar
stories.description: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.

stories.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
stories.description: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

stories.title: UK allows US to use bases to strike Strait of Hormuz targets
stories.description: Downing Street says ministers approved the expansion after accusing Iran of "reckless strikes".

stories.title: 'You can't smell Nowruz in the air': Iran marks Persian new year under threat of strikes
stories.description: Iranians speak to the BBC about preparing for the Nowruz new year festival during the war.

stories.title: Are US and Israel aligned on Iran war? Deciphering Trump's post after gas field attacks
stories.description: What does Trump's Truth Social post after gas field attacks tell us about US-Israeli alignment?

stories.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
stories.description: Conflict has spread across the Middle East since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran on 28 February.

stories.title: 'It's been bittersweet': The Iranian-Iraqi cafe drawing crowds to Hackney
stories.description: Logma, a newly opened Iranian-Iraqi cafe in Hackney, has gone viral for its sandwiches.

stories.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
stories.description: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.

stories.title: How Iranians are evading internet blocks to contact family abroad
stories.description: Iranians are finding tech-savvy ways to get through the regime's restrictions on phone and internet connections.

stories.title: Whose war is it? Trump eyes Iran talks as Israel hints at long campaign
stories.description: Another deadline day, another ultimatum, another surprise turn from the US president. The same Donald Trump who may or may not send ground troops to try and secure the Strait of Hormuz now affirming that his administration's talking with the Iranians and thus holding off on hitti...

stories.title: Replay: Trump addresses war in Iran
stories.description: Rewatch as Trump addresses the war in Iran at a press conference in Memphis.

stories.title: Lebanon : Israel strikes key bridge, stoking fears of ground invasion
stories.description: Israeli forces destroyed bridges they said were used by Hezbollah. The attack has sparked concern that a large-scale Israeli ground invasion could be in the works, with the Lebanese president calling the bombing 'collective punishment'. FRANCE 24's Claire Paccalin reports from th...

stories.title: 'Growing mistrust and disagreement' over Trump declaring war with Iran
stories.description: In a surprise U-turn, US President Donald Trump has extended a deadline he had given to Iran over the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, adding five days to the initial 48-hour window. He had threatened to strike Iranian power plants were the Strait not to be reopened. For FRANCE...

stories.title: Israel destroys another bridge linking south Lebanon to rest of country
stories.description: As it engages in heated battles with pro-Iran militant group Hezbollah in a number of Lebanese border villages, Israel has bombed another bridge across a river dividing the country's north and south. It adds to widespread fears in Lebanon that Israel intends to depopulate the sou...

stories.title: Trump U-turn on Hormuz could be due to 'pressure' from Gulf nations
stories.description: President Donald Trump extended his deadline for Iran to reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz to international shipping. He had previously given a 48-deadline to Tehran, which would lead to strikes on Iranian power plants were the Strait not to reopen. The backtracking could have ...

stories.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
stories.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

stories.title: Tehran residents express distrust over Trump’s war diplomacy
stories.description: “If we trust him, we lose.”

stories.title: Iran denies any talks with US after Trump claims ‘productive’ discussions
stories.description: Iran parliament speaker says US president using idea of talks to 'escape quagmire in which US and Israel are trapped'.

stories.title: Why the oil and gas price shock from the Iran war won’t just fade away
stories.description: Rerouting and diversification cannot help when a significant chunk of oil and gas have been taken off the market.

stories.title: How the Iran war is about to hit your wallet
stories.description: Strikes on gas sites in the Iran war are driving up energy costs, pushing up prices for power, food and more worldwide.

stories.title: Trump can declare victory in Iran – and he should
stories.description: The US president has proven that hitting hard and fast rather than engaging in endless negotiations guarantees victory.

stories.title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
stories.description: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

stories.title: Energy, water, bonds: What are Iran’s targets if Trump hits power plants?
stories.description: Donald Trump's Strait of Hormuz deadline for Iran raises concerns about attacks on energy in the Middle East.

stories.title: Trump signals off-ramp in Iran war despite no ‘regime change’
stories.description: President Donald Trump has ordered the US military to postpone strikes against Iranian power plants and energy.

stories.title: Trump speaks after announcing delay on Iran attacks
stories.description: President Donald Trump has spoken to reporters after announcing the US was postponing attacks targeting Iran’s energy.

stories.title: Madrid protest against US blockade of Cuba
stories.description: Protesters gathered outside the US embassy in Madrid as sanctions pushed Cuba into an electricity blackout.

stories.title: ‘False flag attack’: Iran denies claims it fired missiles at Diego Garcia
stories.description: Esmaeil Baghaei denies the long-range missile attack on the base, which could change the war's calculus for US allies.

stories.title: US-Israeli war on Iran strains food, water and fuel prices in India
stories.description: Locals in northern India have a growing concern over costs of essential resources due to the Iran war.

stories.title: ‘NATO joining US-Israel’s war on Iran is between slim and none’
stories.description: ‘NATO joining US-Israel's war on Iran is between slim and none’

stories.title: Pakistan, Egypt, Turkiye engaged in ‘back-channel diplomacy’ for US-Iran de-escalation: sources
stories.description: Pakistan, along with Turkiye and Egypt, is engaged in “active back-channel diplomacy” to “bridge the gap between” the US and Iran, an official in the administration confirmed to Dawn on Monday. The official said that through “active back-channel diplomacy”, involving US Special E...

stories.title: Trump backs down on strikes on Iran’s power network, claims US and Tehran holding talks
stories.description: US President Donald Trump said on Monday he had given orders to postpone any military strikes against Iranian power plants for five days, hours ahead of a deadline that threatened further escalation in the conflict now in its fourth week. Trump claimed in a post on his Truth Soci...

stories.title: Netanyahu says Trump told him about possible Iran deal
stories.description: President Trump believes there is an opportunity to leverage the tremendous achievements we have reached alongside the US military to realize the goals of the war through an agreement, an agreement that will safeguard our vital interests, Netanyahu said in a short video message d...

stories.title: Iran still mulls closing Strait of Hormuz, not knowing US next move — TV
stories.description: The official cited by Al Jazeera confirmed that Iran and the US "exchanged messages through Egypt and Turkey to reduce tensions"

stories.title: US destroys 158 Iranian ships, Trump claims
stories.description: Trump also said that launches of Iranian drones and missiles allegedly decreased by more than 90%

stories.title: Hezbollah commander killed by Israeli drone in Lebanon’s Al-Khiyam — media
stories.description: According to the portal, Ali Assaf, reputed as an "ambush engineer," was one of Hezbollah's top commanders

stories.title: US needs to curb Israel for dialogue with Iran — former head of counterterrorism center
stories.description: Former director of the US National Counterterrorism Center Joe Kent believes that Israel will try to destroy the negotiations

stories.title: US wants to wind down Iran war by mid-April ahead of Trump's Israel Prize awarding — Ynet
stories.description: The Americans have marked April 9 as the date for the end of the war, the source said

stories.title: Adviser to Iranian parliament speaker says talks with US won't go on as previously
stories.description: According to Ebrahim Rasouli, Iran doesn’t want the countries that "have sold themselves out to America" and Israel to "derive profit from the Strait of Hormuz"

stories.title: US in contact with ‘top person’ in Iran, but not supreme leader — Trump
stories.description: According to the US President, information about the new contacts between the US and Iran probably "hasn't been conveyed" to the officials in the Islamic Republic who are denying it

stories.title: Meeting between US, Iranian negotiators may be organized later this week — TV
stories.description: According to the official, Washington is looking at appointing Vice President JD Vance the United States’ chief negotiator at the potential talks

stories.title: Israel believes US in contact with chairman of Iran’s Mejlis — TV
stories.description: The source claimed that Israel was aware that several countries were making mediation efforts to start negotiations, but Israel was surprised by Donald Trump's statement that these contacts were progressing

stories.title: US energy secretary considers Iranian control over Strait of Hormuz unacceptable
stories.description: Earlier, US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz would reopen without delay if Washington and Tehran reach an agreement in their ongoing discussions

stories.title: Trump hopes for regime change in Iran
stories.description: The American leader talked about Venezuela and stressed that the US were very successful there

stories.title: US orders 22 B-2 strategic bombers, Trump says
stories.description: Washington is using these aircraft in the current US-Israeli military operation against Iran

stories.title: Strait of Hormuz to reopen immediately if US, Iran reach deal — Trump
stories.description: The US leader said that in this case, the strait would be "jointly controlled"

stories.title: Proposals on Middle East de-escalation must be addressed to US — Iranian Foreign Ministry
stories.description: According to the statement, Iran is not the side that started that war

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
